_**Agent (composer-2-fast)**_

Here is a structured summary of `C:\Users\rizqi\Projects\acousticsim\results\array_explorer.html` based on the full file (the very long **line 129** is a single embedded `SRP_DATA` JSON object; everything else is readable in normal-sized chunks).

---

## 1. HTML / CSS structure and UI layout

**Document shell:** HTML5 page with Google Fonts (`DM Mono`, `Outfit`), a single full-viewport WebGL canvas, and three fixed overlay panels.

**Layout (fixed panels + canvas):**

- **`#canvas3d`** — `100vw` × `100vh`, `display:block`, `body` has `overflow:hidden` so the 3D view fills the screen (`lines 9–10`).
- **`#controls.panel`** — top-left (`top:14px; left:14px`), width `280px`, scrollable if needed, glassy dark background, border, blur (`lines 11–16`).
- **`#info.panel`** — bottom-left, monospace stats (`lines 19, 109`).
- **`#legend.panel`** — top-right, small color key for scene elements (`lines 20, 111–117`).

**Control groups inside `#controls`:**

- Title **“Array Explorer”** (`h2`).
- **Mode toggle row** — two `.toggle-btn` divs: `#btnBeam`, `#btnSRP` (`lines 43–46`).
- **`#beamControls`** — geometry select, mic count, radius, optional ring separation, steer az/el, frequency (`lines 49–84`).
- **`#srpControls`** — starts with `.hidden`; geometry + condition selects populated from data (`lines 87–96`).
- Shared **display radius** and **opacity** sliders (`lines 98–106`).

**CSS highlights:** reset, dark theme, styled range inputs, `.toggle-btn.active` state, `.val` accent color, `.hidden{display:none!important}` (`lines 7–35`).

**Scripts:** `importmap` for `three@0.162.0` via `esm.sh`, then one `type="module"` block with all app logic (`lines 121–126`).

---

## 2. JavaScript geometry builder functions

Mic layouts are arrays of **`[x, y, z]`** in meters (array plane mostly in XY; cylinder uses ±Z rings).

| Function | Role |
|----------|------|
| `makeUCA(nMics, radius)` | Points on a circle in the XY plane, uniform in azimuth (`lines 141–147`). |
| `makeCross(nMics, halfLen)` | Splits mics across two arms: horizontal X and vertical Z; uses `floor(nMics/2)` per arm (`lines 150–161`). |
| `makeULA(nMics, length)` | Uniform spacing along X from `-length/2` to `+length/2`; `length = radius*2` from caller (`lines 164–169`). |
| `makeCylinder(nMics, radius, separation)` | Two rings with `perRing = floor(nMics/2)`, lower/upper Z = `±separation/2`, upper ring rotated by half a sector (`lines 172–184`). |
| `buildGeometry(name, nMics, radius, separation)` | Switches on `UCA` / `CROSS` / `ULA` / `CYLINDER` (`lines 187–194`). |

---

## 3. Beam pattern computation

**Grid:** 72 azimuth samples (`GRID_AZ`), 19 colatitude samples from 0 to π (`GRID_COLAT`) (`lines 132–138`).

**`dirVec(az, colat)`** — unit direction from spherical angles:  
`[sin(colat)cos(az), sin(colat)sin(az), cos(colat)]` (`lines 198–201`).

**`computeBeamPattern(mics, steerAzRad, steerElRad, freq)`** (`lines 203–227`):

- Converts steering elevation to colatitude: `steerColat = π/2 - steerElRad`.
- Steering direction `dSteer = dirVec(steerAz, steerColat)`.
- Wavenumber `k = 2πf / 343`.
- For each grid direction `dLook`, forms **difference vector** `dLook - dSteer` and sums **`exp(i k (r_m · Δ))`** over mics (implemented as cos/sin accumulators).
- Normalized power per cell: `(re² + im²) / M²`.

So this is a **steered delay-and-sum beamformer power pattern** on a sphere, in the **narrowband** approximation.

**Helpers:** `maxMicSpacing`, `minAdjacentSpacing` (pairwise over all pairs), `estimateBeamwidth` (counts cells ≥ half peak power and maps to a rough solid-angle-style number in “deg²”) (`lines 230–266`).

---

## 4. SRP simulation data loading and display logic

**Data:** After the module imports, `const SRP_DATA = { ... }` is embedded (starts ~line 128–129). From the start of that object (visible in grep): `room_dim`, `array_center`, `drone`, `true_az_deg`, `true_el_deg`, `mic_positions` (per geometry key), and **`spectra`** — an array of entries with at least `geometry`, `condition`, `power`, `est_az_deg`, `est_el_deg`, etc.

**Setup:**

- `srpGeoSet` / `srpCondSet` — unique `geometry` and `condition` values from `SRP_DATA.spectra` (`lines 398–399`).
- Selects `#srpGeo` / `#srpCond` are filled from those sets; condition labels map `rt60_1.0` to a friendly string (`lines 400–403`).
- `getSRPSpectrum(geo, cond)` — `find` matching entry (`lines 405–407`).
- `srpToPowerGrid(spec)` — returns **`spec.power`** as the 2D grid (variables `az_rad` / `colat_rad` are read but unused; grid is assumed aligned with the same `N_AZ` × `N_COLAT` indexing as the beam mode) (`lines 409–414`).

**`refreshSRP()`** (`lines 492–531`):

- Loads spectrum for current selects; early return if missing.
- Updates display radius/opacity labels from shared `getParams()`.
- Places mics from `SRP_DATA.mic_positions[geo]` in the scene, **centered** by subtracting `array_center`, with the same axis permutation as beam mode: `(x, z, y)` (`lines 502–511`).
- Builds the same `buildPatternMesh` from `spec.power`.
- Draws steer arrow toward **estimated** az/el from the spectrum.
- Info panel: true vs estimated angles and wrapped azimuth / absolute elevation errors.

---

## 5. Three.js scene setup and rendering

**Core:** `WebGLRenderer` on `#canvas3d`, clear color `0x0a0a0f`, size and `pixelRatio` capped at 2 (`lines 269–273`). `PerspectiveCamera(50, ...)`, initial position `(3,3,3)` (`lines 275–277`). **`OrbitControls`** with damping (`lines 279–281`).

**Lights:** ambient + directional (`lines 283–286`). **`AxesHelper(0.4)`** at origin (`lines 288–289`).

**Groups:**

- `micGroup` — mic spheres (`lines 291–304`).
- `steerGroup` — line + cone “arrow” (`lines 306–329`).
- `beamGroup` — colored surface + faint wireframe duplicate (`lines 332–395`).

**`buildPatternMesh(power, dispRadius, opacity)`** (`lines 340–395`):

- Normalizes power by max.
- For each (colat, az) grid point, radius = `dispRadius * (0.25 + 0.75 * normalized_power)` on the unit direction sphere — a **radial deformation** of the sphere.
- Vertex colors lerp low → mid → high (`colorLow` / `colorMid` / `colorHigh`).
- Builds indexed triangles with a **closed azimuth loop** (`ai` goes `0..N_AZ` with `ai % N_AZ` for data).
- Phong material with vertex colors + transparency; second mesh wireframe for depth cue.

**Render loop:** `animate()` → `requestAnimationFrame`, `controls.update()`, `renderer.render(scene, camera)` (`lines 567–572`). **Resize** handler updates camera aspect and renderer size (`lines 574–578`).

**Axis convention:** Positions use **`(x, y_three, z) = (x_array, z_array, y_array)`** in both `renderMics` and SRP mic placement so the math “vertical” in array coords maps to Three’s Y.

---

## 6. Mode toggle (Beam Pattern vs SRP Simulation)

**State:** `let mode = 'beam' | 'srp'` (`lines 417, 417`).

**Beam button** (`lines 539–546`): sets `mode = 'beam'`, toggles `.active` classes, shows `#beamControls`, hides `#srpControls`, calls `refresh()`.

**SRP button** (`lines 547–554`): sets `mode = 'srp'`, opposite visibility, `refresh()`.

**`refresh()`** dispatches to `refreshBeam()` or `refreshSRP()` (`lines 533–536`).

Shared sliders (**display radius**, **opacity**) stay visible in both modes and affect the pattern mesh in either path.

---

## 7. Event listener wiring

| Target | Event | Action |
|--------|--------|--------|
| `#btnBeam`, `#btnSRP` | `click` | Mode switch + panel visibility + `refresh()` (`lines 539–554`). |
| `elSelGeo`, `elMicCount`, `elRadius`, `elSep`, `elSteerAz`, `elSteerEl`, `elFreq`, `elDispRadius`, `elOpacity` | `input` | `refresh()` (`lines 557–559`). |
| `#srpGeo`, `#srpCond` | `change` | `refresh()` (`lines 560–561`). |
| `window` | `resize` | Camera + renderer resize (`lines 574–578`). |

**Init:** `refresh()` once at load (`lines 563–564`).
